rides.title: Rides
rides.login_required: Log in to create ride requests

cta_stop.title: Can't wait for the bus?
cta_stop.description: Request a carpool ride from this stop

rides.landing_meta: Find or offer rides at public transit stops. No commissions, with encrypted chat. Free and open-source.
rides.landing_hero_subtitle: Request a ride at your stop, get offers from drivers and coordinate via encrypted chat. No commissions, no middlemen.
rides.landing_problem_1: Uber and Bolt charge high commissions and track every move
rides.landing_problem_2: Public transit doesn't cover the last mile in many areas
rides.landing_problem_3: No safe way to arrange rides with neighbors and strangers
rides.landing_feature_1_desc: All rides start and end at public transit stops — integrated with the GTFS network
rides.landing_feature_2_desc: Zero platform fees. Passengers set the price, drivers offer — direct agreement
rides.landing_feature_3_desc: When a ride is accepted, an encrypted Matrix chat between passenger and driver is created automatically
rides.landing_feature_4_desc: Search for rides near you by geolocation or along a planned route
rides.landing_feature_5_desc: Mutual 1-5 star reviews after each ride build community reputation
rides.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no commissions, no ads. Civic infrastructure, not a product
rides.landing_how_1: Create a ride request — choose origin and destination stops
rides.landing_how_2: Drivers see your request and send offers with vehicle description
rides.landing_how_3: Accept an offer — encrypted chat created automatically for coordination
rides.landing_free_desc: Sharing a car should not enrich a corporation. Parahub connects people directly, no middlemen.
